summary: 1 film announcement, 1 TV announcement across 3 trades.

film.title: 13 Going on 30 Reboot
film.announcement: Jennifer Garner and Judy Greer will appear in Netflix's reboot of '13 Going on 30' in cameo roles.

tv.title: Euphoria
tv.announcement: Jacob Elordi discusses filming his character's death scene and returning for the final season of 'Euphoria.'
